invariants.predicate: A deferred background audio chunk exists without wake buffering support.
invariants.regressionException: Active diagnostic guard; focused regression not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The backend attempted an active PTT wake path without a token-backed row for the selected target device.
invariants.regressionException: Backend source lives in turbo/main; register before adding checker-backed Unison regression metadata.
invariants.repairAction: Do not silently retarget an active transmit to another latest token row; require the exact selected target device to remain token-backed.

invariants.predicate: Active transmit matched the signaling sender while backend joined-presence truth was missing.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in turbo/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Backend active transmit exists while the selected peer is neither joined nor wake-addressable.
invariants.repairAction: Membership loss, token loss, and local join failure must clear active transmit when they remove the only addressable receiver.

invariants.predicate: The backend channel-state projection reached connecting without durable membership or request evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in turbo/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The join route attempted to mark an active channel without connected websocket session evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in turbo/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Channel membership regressed from a live projection to idle or absent without an authoritative leave, disconnect, expiry, or repair reason.
invariants.regressionException: Backend source of truth lives in turbo/main; register the invariant now and add the emitting checker-backed regression there.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC attempt remains active after the surfaced media path has fallen back to relay or Fast Relay and no Direct QUIC probe controller is alive.
invariants.repairAction: Clear the stale Direct QUIC attempt without retry backoff so the normal selected-contact or automatic reprobe can start.

invariants.predicate: A Direct QUIC attempt is active with a live probe controller while the surfaced media transport path is relay, Fast Relay, promoting, or recovering.
invariants.repairAction: Restore the surfaced transport path to Direct and suppress redundant prewarm/probe attempts while the active Direct path owns the media route.

invariants.predicate: The backend channel-state projection reported no membership while durable channel membership still existed.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in turbo/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: The backend may project joined, ready, signaling-authorized, or transmit-capable state only when the device has an active participant lease for that channel: durable membership, matching fresh channel presence, and a connected current session.
invariants.repairAction: Suppress active call projection when the participant lease cannot be derived; stale durable rows may remain but no longer imply live call state.

invariants.predicate: A fresh websocket session cleared stale channel membership left behind by an old local session.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.presence.internal.clearStaleChannelMembershipOnSessionConnect ends transmit and removes stale direct-channel memberships during fresh session connect.

invariants.predicate: Raw peer presence matched the channel without fresh connected session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.channels.internal.appendStalePeerPresenceProjectedLiveInvariant marks stale peer presence offline before emitting if the projection remains stale.

invariants.predicate: Raw self presence matched the channel without fresh connected session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.channels.internal.appendStaleSelfPresenceProjectedLiveInvariant marks stale self presence offline before emitting if the projection remains stale.

invariants.predicate: Contact summary projected connectable without live peer visibility or request evidence.
invariants.repairAction: Contact summaries derive channel membership from active participant leases and current request facts instead of durable membership rows alone.

invariants.predicate: Presence was marked offline/background while socket truth still remained for the device. Session-only continuity after the socket is cleared is allowed for background/offline grace.
invariants.regressionException: Backend detector exists in turbo/main; focused Unison regression metadata not added yet.

invariants.predicate: A fresh websocket session found and cleared stale active-channel presence from a previous session.
invariants.repairAction: turbo.service.presence.internal.clearStaleActiveChannelOnSessionConnect clears only the stale active-channel pointer; durable membership is preserved so reconnect recovery can rejoin idempotently.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen exposes Hold To Talk while the selected peer phase is not live.
invariants.repairAction: Derive call-screen visibility and primary action from selected peer state; stale expansion requests must not force a live call surface.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for a selected peer whose authoritative client projection is idle.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen presentation must be derived by ConversationStateMachine.shouldShowCallScreen and must collapse when the selected peer returns to idle.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for an incoming request before accept created local join evidence.
invariants.repairAction: Incoming-request expansion may surface the request affordance, but call-screen presentation requires pending join, local session, system session, or backend session evidence.

invariants.predicate: The visible call screen is rendered for a selected peer whose authoritative client projection is still requested.
invariants.repairAction: Requested state may show request affordances, but call-screen presentation must stay collapsed until join evidence or a live call phase exists.

invariants.predicate: Encrypted media replay protection rejected an already-seen packet.
invariants.regressionException: Security diagnostic guard; focused replay regression not added yet.

invariants.predicate: Both devices report backend readiness, but at least one selected UI projection is not live.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device is connectable while the peer remains idle/requested without an equivalent connectable projection.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device is ready while the peer has not converged to a compatible live session projection.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: One device observes a pending outgoing request while the peer's latest diagnostics does not observe the matching incoming request after the receiver evidence should be fresh.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; follow-up scenario/projection proof should be added once the receiver freshness owner is fixed.

invariants.predicate: Both devices project peer-ready state without local session evidence.
invariants.regressionException: Merged pair detector is active; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: The system began foreground transmit without a local foreground press owner.
invariants.repairAction: rejectForegroundSystemTransmitBeginWithoutLocalIntentIfNeeded stops system transmit, clears pending begin state, and syncs transmit/UI state.

invariants.predicate: Apple restored a PTT channel that the app cannot map to backend contact truth.
invariants.repairAction: clearUnresolvedRestoredSystemSessionIfNeeded clears the unresolved restored PTT system session after backend refresh cannot map it.

invariants.predicate: Apple delivered a local system-begin while the app projects the peer as active transmitter.
invariants.repairAction: rejectSystemTransmitBeginIfPeerIsActive stops local system transmit and preserves peer-transmit authority.

invariants.predicate: Receiver background readiness is not ready and no typed wake reason explains it.
A pending talk request to an available recipient must not send an alert APNs surface in addition to the foreground/control-plane request projection.
invariants.repairAction: createControlCommand suppresses invite alert pushes for available recipients and reserves APNs alert delivery for offline or busy recipients.

invariants.predicate: Multiple local sources that describe the same incoming talk request must converge to one canonical request key, so opening or accepting one source cannot resurface or double-accept the same request through another source.
invariants.repairAction: TalkRequestSurfaceReducer deduplicates visible, opened, and accepting talk-request state by TalkRequestKey(contactID, requestCount) instead of per-surface invite IDs.

invariants.predicate: When the app launches or enters foreground, delivered talk-request alert surfaces must be cleared so stale Apple notifications cannot be accepted after the app is already showing authoritative request state.
invariants.repairAction: TurboAppDelegate clears delivered talk-request notifications and resets the badge on launch, will-enter-foreground, and did-become-active.

invariants.predicate: Accepting an in-app foreground talk request must synchronously consume the visible surface and establish at most one local accept/join intent for that request.
invariants.repairAction: acceptActiveIncomingTalkRequest marks the surface opened before backend work and fences repeated accepts for the same canonical request key while the accept intent is in flight.

invariants.predicate: Accepting a visible in-app foreground talk request must use the rendered request surface snapshot, so backend sync or duplicate-surface churn during the tap cannot turn the accept into a no-op.
invariants.repairAction: ContentView passes the rendered IncomingTalkRequestSurface into the accept command and PTTViewModel accepts that captured surface directly.

invariants.predicate: Accepting an in-app foreground talk request whose fast notification arrived before request projection must preserve a pending accept intent and complete it once the incoming request projects.
invariants.repairAction: acceptIncomingTalkRequestSurface stores a pending foreground accept intent, dismisses the visible surface, refreshes request state, and reconcile completes the accept when relationship projection becomes incoming.

invariants.predicate: Automatic invite-sync contact selection must not consume or dismiss an active in-app foreground talk-request surface; only an explicit user open, dismiss, or accept action may mark that surface opened.
invariants.repairAction: reconcileContactSelectionIfNeeded auto-selects incoming-request contacts without calling markTalkRequestSurfaceOpened, while explicit selectContact user paths still consume the surface.

invariants.predicate: Continuing an Apple INStartCallIntent from a talk-request notification must route to the same accept/join command as the in-app and UNNotification accept paths.
invariants.repairAction: ContentView handles INStartCallIntent user activities and PTTViewModel normalizes them into ConversationOpenIntent(action: accept).

invariants.predicate: A foreground request notification is present but not represented in the request/contact projection.
invariants.repairAction: scheduleTalkRequestProjectionRecovery refreshes contact summaries and invites after a bounded delay.

invariants.predicate: Synthetic probe event used to verify backend invariant event ingest and readback.
The local/system session is active and backend membership still includes the user, but backend readiness reports selfHasActiveDevice=false.
invariants.repairAction: The app reconnects the WebSocket if needed, reasserts backend join, refreshes channel/contact projections, and republishes receiver readiness.

invariants.predicate: The local/system session is active, but backend membership dropped self while the peer remained joined.
invariants.repairAction: The app reconnects the WebSocket if needed, reasserts backend join, refreshes channel/contact projections, and republishes receiver readiness.

invariants.predicate: A media relay send was attempted after the relay had already reported the peer unavailable.
invariants.repairAction: The client records the contradiction, clears the stale media relay client, and falls back to WebSocket relay until a fresh relay peer becomes available.

invariants.predicate: Backend dropped durable channel membership while the selected session still had concrete local or system-session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: effectiveChannelStatePreservingLiveMembership preserves the last known live channel state until an authoritative leave, disconnect, or explicit inactive-without-membership snapshot arrives.

invariants.predicate: Backend membership is absent while selected peer still has a pending local session action without local session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: completeAbsentBackendMembershipRecoveryIfLocalSessionEnded chooses a typed repair or suppression decision; stale pending join/leave state is cleared only when backend membership is already absent and no valid in-flight join is preserving the local action.

invariants.predicate: Backend regressed to idle while the selected session still had concrete live local evidence.
invariants.repairAction: effectiveChannelStatePreservingLiveMembership preserves the ready live channel state until an authoritative leave or disconnect arrives.

invariants.predicate: Backend is idle or absent, no local session or pending action exists, and requester auto-join is not armed while selected peer still projects a connecting pending-join state.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedPeerReducer clears requester auto-join when backend request relationship and membership are absent, then preserves interruption evidence to block stale requester auto-join rearming.

invariants.predicate: Backend says the session is inactive while selected UI remains joined/waiting.
invariants.repairAction: SessionCoordinator/SelectedPeerSession reconciliation tears down invalid local session state after backend absence is authoritative.

invariants.predicate: Backend membership is absent while selected UI still has joined local session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: completeAbsentBackendMembershipRecoveryIfLocalSessionEnded and reconciled teardown clear local session state after backend membership becomes absent.

invariants.predicate: Backend says peer is ready/connected while selected peer remains blocked on remote audio prewarm.
invariants.repairAction: backend signaling join recovery and selected-session refresh wait for remote audio readiness instead of forcing a stale live UI projection.

invariants.predicate: Backend says both sides are ready while selected UI projection remains idle/requested/incoming.
invariants.regressionException: Detector exists in app and merged diagnostics; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: Selected peer remained in disconnecting state past its bounded timeout.
invariants.repairAction: scheduleDisconnectRecovery retries system leave, resets local PTT/media/transmit runtime, clears pending leave, and refreshes backend membership.

invariants.predicate: The call screen is visible while the authoritative selected-peer projection is still plain online/requestable.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen presentation must stay collapsed while selectedPeerPhase remains idle/online; plain requestable state belongs on the detail or home surface until a live/joining phase exists.

invariants.predicate: Selected route toggled from requested to call-visible and back to requested for the same contact without a selected-peer phase change.
invariants.repairAction: Call-screen visibility must remain collapsed while selectedPeerPhase stays requested; expansion and dismissal transitions must not oscillate without a live-phase transition.

invariants.predicate: A joined live session regressed to waiting-for-peer because wake capability disappeared.
Selected-session diagnostics report a local join failure.
invariants.regressionException: Merged diagnostics detector is active; promoted scenario expected when this recurs.

invariants.predicate: The selected contact projection says online while selected peer status renders offline.
invariants.regressionException: Merged diagnostics detector is active; promoted scenario expected when this recurs.

invariants.predicate: Backend says peer is joined while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
invariants.regressionException: Detector exists in app and merged diagnostics; scenario invariant DSL work will add first-class assertions.

invariants.predicate: Backend channel is connectable and peer wake is available while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
Selected peer regressed to localJoinFailed even though backend still retained self membership and wake-capable peer recovery evidence.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedPeerReducer suppresses interrupted retry copy while wake-capable backend recovery remains authoritative.

invariants.predicate: Selected peer is ready while backend says this device cannot transmit.
Selected peer phase is ready while the local app is not joined.
Selected peer projection remains transmitting after local membership/session exit.
Selected peer projection is receiving while the local app lacks joined/session/activation evidence.
The selected receive path is stuck with stale pending playback drain state.
invariants.repairAction: receive execution schedules or completes remote silence timeout to drain stale pending playback state.

invariants.predicate: Selected peer is still disconnecting for reconciled teardown after local and backend sessions are absent.
Backend retained durable channel membership while selected peer is peer-ready without local session evidence.
invariants.repairAction: SelectedPeerEffect.clearStaleBackendMembership sends an idempotent backend leave and clears stale local leave state.

invariants.predicate: Backend retained inactive durable channel membership while the selected app has no local, system, pending, or request evidence for that membership.
invariants.repairAction: ConversationStateMachine projects idle while SelectedPeerEffect.clearStaleBackendMembership sends an idempotent backend leave.

invariants.predicate: Backend readiness is waiting-for-self while selected UI remains disconnected/non-connectable.
Peer is wake-capable and backend ready while selected peer remains blocked on local audio prewarm.
invariants.repairAction: interactive audio prewarm recovery keeps the joined session bounded while waiting for wake-capable peer audio readiness.

invariants.predicate: Outbound audio was about to be sent before the remote receiver readiness gate was satisfied.
invariants.repairAction: remote receiver readiness gate suppresses outbound audio and waits through bounded wake-recovery grace windows.

invariants.predicate: The first outbound audio payload was queued to at least one transport but no receiver playback ACK arrived before timeout.
invariants.repairAction: The sender records missing receiver playback proof so diagnostics can distinguish queued media from heard media and escalate fallback policy.

invariants.predicate: Client remains transmitting or receiving beyond the allowed grace window after backend active-transmit lease expiry.
A stale transmit-ended signal or completion clears a newer active transmit projection.
invariants.repairAction: transmit stop completion carries the owning transmit target and is ignored when a newer active target is current.

invariants.predicate: Transmit startup side effect completed after its owning attempt became stale.
invariants.repairAction: transmit startup side-effect completion is ignored when its owning attempt is no longer current.
